title: onosma viridis
intro: Onosma viridis, also known as Green Onosma, is a plant species in the family Apocynaceae. It is commonly used in traditional medicine, particularly in China and India, for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Onosma viridis include its ability to alleviate symptoms of fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and improve immune function. Onosma viridis can be prepared as an herbal tea, decoction, or tincture, and is often used in conjunction with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
